raw_consumer_statement: I had several fraudulent charges on my Citi card during week of XXXX XXXX. Citi took care of all but XXXX of them and have been investigating the largest amount for 6 months all the while telling me not to pay since it is fraud ( this was told to me by several employees over XXXX different phone calls ). Since then, nothing has been resolved even though several supervisors claimed they escalated the issue and I would soon hear from them. All the while I've been receiving collection calls, texts, and emails ( 7 days a week and all hours ) regarding a past due account, not to mention hundreds of dollars in fees and interest! My credit score went from mid XXXX to below XXXX. As a retired banker I take this very personally as it affects my sleep and health.
